item.name: Analytics
Factset Starts a New Script Calculation

request.name: Factset Starts a New Script Calculation

description.content: This endpoint takes a python script and starts executing it within FPE

response.name: Expected response, contains the relative URL in the Location header to check the status of the calculation.

header.description: Relative URL to check status of the request.

response.name: Invalid request body provided
Server error. Log the X-DataDirect-Request-Key header to assist in troubleshooting.
Request timeout. Retry the request later
